name: RABBIT-CAGE-2
title: dispatch-feature-edit.sh computes REPO_ROOT 5 levels up (should be 4) — silently resolves to wrong directory
description: contract/scripts/dispatch-feature-edit.sh line 20 uses cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../../.." (5 levels) to compute REPO_ROOT. The script lives at .claude/features/contract/scripts/dispatch-feature-edit.sh — 4 levels below the repo root. Five levels resolves to the parent of the repo root (e.g. /home/cyxu/workflow-dev instead of /home/cyxu/workflow-dev/rabbit-run). This means REGISTRY, FEATURE_DIR, SCOPE_MARKER, and all paths derived from REPO_ROOT point at the wrong tree and the script silently fails or operates on wrong files.

history.note: Fixed: changed 5-level to 4-level path computation in dispatch-feature-edit.sh line 20.
